name: io.github.AlgoVaultFi/crypto-quant-signal-mcp
description: Crypto perp signals, funding arb scanning, and market regime detection via MCP.

tools.name: get_trade_signal
tools.description: Returns a composite BUY/SELL/HOLD signal for a Hyperliquid perp with confidence score and reasoning.

tools.name: scan_funding_arb
tools.description: Scans cross-venue funding rate differences between Hyperliquid, Binance, and Bybit. Returns top arb opportunities.

tools.name: get_market_regime
tools.description: Classifies current market regime (TRENDING_UP/DOWN, RANGING, VOLATILE) with cross-venue funding sentiment.

resources.name: Signal performance track record
resources.description: Historical signal accuracy: win rate, Sharpe ratio, profit factor.
